name: Injective 中文 🧬 🥷
fullText:
Injective Summit 汇聚了来自行业、机构和政府的重量级人物。

往届演讲嘉宾：

→ @BlockchainAssn 首席执行官Summer Mersinger
→ @Citi  花旗集团北美数字资产市场主管 Grace Chao
→ @NYDFS  纽约州金融服务部副部长 John Melican

行业领袖正在塑造数万亿美元资金上链的方式。 https://t.co/VXE7WNt1By

name: Solana
fullText:
“They’ve nailed the trilemma of decentralisation, security and performance. Solana has really optimised these three pillars, combined with killer developer tools and a great ecosystem”

Abra CEO, @billbar explains why developers are choosing Solana https://t.co/rKKeGbDeim

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: OpenAI’s long-awaited adult mode is reportedly “freaking out” its own advisers.
